title: Trajectory following — stepping along the scan path with < and > keys
capture_instructions: Split-viewport layout. The 3D viewport should show the vehicle trajectory line (if visible in the dataset). The slab center line should be positioned perpendicular to the trajectory direction, showing trajectory-aligned placement. The 2D viewport should show the current cross-section contents. Ideally show the trajectory line in the 3D view with the slab crossing it at a right angle.
ui_state: Plan/Profile active, slab positioned on trajectory, 2D panel showing cross-section

annotations.label: Vehicle trajectory line visible in 3D view
Current slab position on the trajectory
2D viewport updates at each trajectory step
